coordinate_frame.local_x: raft longitudinal axis, positive toward bow
coordinate_frame.local_y: raft lateral axis, positive starboard/river-right in fixture space

d3_water_sampler.note: Adapters may replace the field implementation, but must preserve the recorded surface height and velocity vectors per fixture.

adapter_contract.required_output: baseline delta metrics plus telemetry hash
